The code does not perform any write operations, handle untrusted inputs, or contain any suspicious logic.\n\n- **Potential assumptions about vulnerabilities:**  \n  All reports correctly avoid making unwarranted assumptions. They recognize the code as a standard, safe interface factory.\n\n---\n\n### Specific comments per report:\n\n**Report 1:**  \n- Correctly identifies the code as benign.  \n- Scores are appropriate.  \n- No changes needed.\n\n**Report 2:**  \n- Same conclusion.  \n- Scores are appropriate.  \n- No changes needed.\n\n**Report 3:**  \n- Also correctly identifies the code as standard and safe.  \n- No issues.\n\n**Report 4:**  \n- Slightly lower confidence (0.95) and a small security risk score (0.1).  \n- Given the code's benign nature, the security risk score could be set to 0.  \n- The report correctly notes no malicious intent.\n\n**Report 5:**  \n- Similar to others, with a confidence of 1 and zero malware/security risk.  \n- Appropriate.\n\n---\n\n### Final assessment:\n\n- **Malware score:**  \n  All reports agree on 0. No malicious, obfuscated, or risky behavior is present.
